reviews.review_msg: I had both 251 and 312 with him, he was pretty good in both but I think better in 312..
Friendly and looks very smart, explain stuff well and at the end he asks you to explain it back to him.  ask him whats on the exam and he ll give you some helpful hints
Avoid this Guy. he told me Ill be fine and I got F

312 is a killer course but he tries to make it easier. Fashionable guy, doenst answer emails. ended up with B+. dont take it summer time as the course is very demanding. Ace the first midterm , final will screw you.
Nice Guy, Knows his stuff, smart, provide his phone number to students but never picks up the phone!
Got A+ nice Guy take it with him
He was very helpful and always available for extra help!made the class enjoyable and understandable
Pretty nice guy, the subject is very hard, he make the subject interesting by providing real world examples, a bit harsh on quizzes  Girls tend to like him.

He is very clear, I attended every class, He is a bit harsh on exams and quizzes and he really wants you to learn, the course is tough. Overall I would recommend him. just show on time. he looks cute too.
